# quick-find

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Reusable quick-find search UI: the debounced useSearch hook and the <QuickFindDialog> dialog (navigation injected via onSelect).
- Web:
  - Uses: `infra/endpoints.useEndpoint`, `primitives/loading.Loading`, `primitives/placeholder.Placeholder`, `primitives/row.Row`, `primitives/search.SearchInput`, `primitives/surface.Surface`, `primitives/text.Text`, `primitives/ui-kit.Dialog`, `primitives/ui-kit.DialogContent`, `primitives/ui-kit.ScrollArea`
  - Exports: Types: `QuickFindDialogProps`, `UseSearchOptions`; Values: `QuickFindDialog`, `useSearch`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/pages/content-search`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
